text: Do you work with small businesses?
Hello Flavia. Thank you for the warm welcome.
Welcome to Sebrae, Greg. Let me introduce my team and our agenda.
Thank you. I am from a company in the United Kingdom, and we work with small businesses.
That is our world too. What does your company do exactly?
We help small businesses sell their products abroad. Do you do the same?
Yes, we do. We help them grow and sell to other countries.
Great. Who is my main contact after today?
I am your contact, Greg. Here are all the details.
Welcome to Sebrae. It is a pleasure to meet you.
Let me introduce my team and our agenda for today.
Do you work with small businesses in your country?
We help companies that want to sell abroad.

Hi Flavia, this is Greg from the United Kingdom. Thank you for the agenda. I am very happy to visit your office next week. I have a few questions before I arrive. What time does the meeting start? Where is your head office in Sao Paulo? Do you work with companies that sell abroad? And who is my main contact on the day of the visit? Please send me the details when you can. Thank you, and see you soon.

Good morning, everyone. This is a short reminder about our visitor next week. Greg is a partner from a company abroad, in the United Kingdom. He arrives on Tuesday, and the meeting starts at ten o'clock. Please welcome him at the front desk and help him find the room. He wants to learn what we do and how we help small businesses. Flavia is his main contact, so send all the details to her. Thank you, and have a great week.

First, Flavia reads the email from Greg, the partner from abroad. Then she prepares an agenda for the meeting. Next, she writes clear answers to all his questions. On the day of the visit, she welcomes Greg at the front desk. Finally, she introduces her team and answers every question with confidence.
Do you work with small businesses?
Who is your main contact in Brazil?
Welcome to Sebrae. It is a pleasure to meet you.
Let me introduce my team and our agenda for today.
Do you work with small businesses in your country?
We help companies that want to sell abroad.
